std.value: Last winter holiday, Tom made friends with his grandpa's pet in the countryside. Bob was white with two small eyes. When Tom helped his grandpa water the flowers, Bob sang happily. For lunch, Tom fed Bob some corn and fruit. At night, Bob slept on the desk when Tom read books.

std.value: Last winter holiday, Tom made friends with his grandpa's pet in the countryside. Bob was white with two small eyes. In the morning, when Tom helped his grandpa water the flowers, Bob stood on his shoulder and sang happily. For lunch, Tom fed him some corn and fruit. Bob enjoyed them a lot. At night, Tom read books when Bob slept quietly on the desk. Bob became Tom's friend.

info.value: Hello, I'm Tom. Last winter holiday, I visited my grandpa in the countryside. He had a pet bird called Bob. Bob was white with two small eyes. He had a beautiful voice and loved to sing. Every day, I played with Bob. In the morning, when I helped my grandpa water the flowers, Bob stood on my shoulder and sang happily. For lunch, I fed him some corn and fruit. He enjoyed them a lot. At night, I read books when he slept quietly on the desk. He became my friend. I had a wonderful holiday because of Bob.
info.analyze:
你将听到Tom介绍他在寒假与Bob成为朋友的经历的短文，录音播放两遍。请根据所听到的内容，选择思维导图中正确的信息（二选一），在50秒钟内说一段话转述他的介绍（包含四个要点的内容）。
